_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, STS-26T xenografts treated with sonidegib did not have improved survival consistent with the lack of SHH pathway activation in this cell line
details: STS-26T xenografts treated with sonidegib did not have improved survival
